register.title: Create Your Account
register.subtitle: Start your language learning journey today!
register.invalidEmail: Please enter a valid email address

guestPrompt.title: You're doing great!
guestPrompt.message: Create a free account to save your score and keep your progress safe. Without an account, your XP will be lost when you leave.
guestPrompt.benefit1: Save your XP and learning progress permanently
guestPrompt.benefit2: Track your scores across lessons and flashcards
guestPrompt.benefit3: Pick up right where you left off

guest.loginMessage: Create an account or sign in to save your progress and unlock all features.
guest.signupDesc: Create a free account to keep your XP, unlock all features, and track your learning journey.

home.heroSubtitle: Structured lessons, interactive flashcards, and progress tracking — all with native audio.
home.unlockDesc: Enable Challenge Mode to track your streak, complete daily quests, and compete on the leaderboard!
home.stopDecayWarning: Answer a question to stop the decay!

home.leaderboardSubtitle: Top Challenge Mode learners this week

progress.title: Your Progress
progress.subtitle: Track your learning journey
progress.noActivities: No activities in this category yet.
progress.noStruggles: You're not struggling with anything right now. Keep it up!
progress.spacedRepetitionTip: Review flashcards regularly to improve retention
progress.activePracticeTip: Focus on struggling areas to improve faster
progress.stayConsistentTip: Study a little bit every day for best results
progress.tipFocusWeakDesc: You have {{count}} struggling areas. Review them daily to improve faster.
progress.tipBoostSkillDesc: Your {{skill}} average is {{avg}}%. Try more {{skill}} exercises.
progress.tipDeepenDesc: You have many items still in progress. Revisit lessons before moving on.
progress.tipChallengeDesc: You've mastered {{count}} areas! Try harder lessons to keep growing.
progress.tipStrengthDesc: Great work at {{avg}}%! Keep it up and try advanced content.
progress.tipMasterNextDesc: {{count}} areas are almost mastered. A few more reviews and you'll get there!
progress.tipRepetitionDesc: Review flashcards regularly to lock in long-term memory.
progress.noAreas: No items in this category yet.
progress.analyticsTitle: What your activity is telling us
progress.analyticsSubtitle: Use this as a simple read on momentum, review pressure, and the next useful step.
progress.nextFocusBody: This area is showing the clearest signal for extra practice.
progress.nextFocusEmptyBody: Practice a little more and this will become more specific.

profilePage.voiceDescription: Choose a {{language}} voice for pronunciation. Your selection syncs across devices.
profilePage.noVoices: No {{language}} voices available on this device. Try using Chrome or Edge for more voice options.
profilePage.xpModeDescription: Choose how your XP system works. Challenge Mode adds XP decay for inactivity.
profilePage.relaxedDesc: No XP decay. Learn at your own pace.
profilePage.challengeDesc: XP decays after 48h of inactivity. Stay sharp!
profilePage.challengeWarning: Switching to Challenge Mode will reset your XP to 0. Your learning history will be preserved, but you'll start earning XP from scratch.
profilePage.challengeDetail: In Challenge Mode, your XP decays by 15% per day after 48 hours of inactivity. Only answering questions resets the timer.
profilePage.relaxedWarning: Your current XP will be preserved in Relaxed Mode. However, if you switch back to Challenge Mode in the future, your XP will be wiped to 0.
profilePage.resetProgressDesc: Reset your XP and answer history. Your XP will go back to 0 and all questions will award full points again.
profilePage.resetConfirm: Are you sure you want to reset your XP and answer history? Your XP will go back to 0.
profilePage.deleteAccountDesc: Permanently delete your account and all associated data. This action cannot be undone.
profilePage.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete your account? This action cannot be undone.
profilePage.challengeEnabled: Challenge Mode enabled! XP has been reset.
profilePage.relaxedEnabled: Switched to Relaxed Mode. Your XP is preserved.
profilePage.xpReset: XP and answer history reset successfully!
profilePage.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 6 characters
profilePage.langChangeHint: To change languages, log out and select new languages when logging back in.
profilePage.voiceHint: Choose the voice used for audio playback.
profilePage.noVoicesShort: No voices available. Tap refresh to load.
profilePage.challengeWarningShort: XP will decay daily if you don't study. Your XP will be reset to 0.
profilePage.relaxedInfo: XP will no longer decay. Your current XP is preserved.
profilePage.resetXPDesc: Clear all XP history. This cannot be undone.
profilePage.personalizationDesc: Save approved words, phrases, and situations from real life so class, conversation, quiz, flashcards, and writing practice can become more relevant to you.
profilePage.practicePromptsHint: Show a quick word question with action buttons, so you can answer from the notification shade.
profilePage.notificationsAllowed: Notifications are allowed on this device.

verifyEmail.successMessage: Your account is now active. You can log in and start learning.

verifyEmail.failedMessage: Verification failed. The link may have expired.

emailBanner.sent: Verification email sent! Check your inbox.

pricing.title: Choose how you want to learn
pricing.subtitle: Start free, upgrade for deeper practice, or bring Lingo Booth to a group with institution seats.

pricing.institutionalTitle: Seats for schools, teams, religious organizations, and groups
pricing.institutionalSubtitle: Institutional subscriptions sit beside individual plans. Members can receive Plus, Pro, or Ultra-level access through their organization without changing their personal account.
pricing.institutionalSent: Thanks. Your request has been received.
pricing.institutionalFailed: Could not send the request. Please try again.
pricing.signInToChooseBody: Create an account or sign in before choosing a paid plan so your access can be attached to you.
pricing.needHelpText: Send a message and we will help you choose the right path.

planTaglines.free: Try the learning loop with daily limits.
planTaglines.plus: More daily conversation and device memory.
planTaglines.pro: Synced memory and personalization for serious learners.
planTaglines.ultra: Everything in Pro, ready for future premium learning tools.
planTaglines.institution_basic: Seats for groups that need guided learning and practice.
planTaglines.institution_pro: Synced learner memory, reports, and class management.
planTaglines.institution_enterprise: Custom onboarding, reporting, and commercial terms.

pricing.discountUnavailable: That discount code is not available for this plan.

contact.title: Tell us what you need
contact.subtitle: Send a question, report a problem, or share feedback. We will review your message and respond when needed.
contact.infoText: Messages from this form are saved securely with account context when available, so we can understand what happened and help faster.
contact.name: Name
contact.subject: Subject
contact.success: Thanks. Your message has been received.
contact.error: We could not send your message right now. Please try again.
contact.profileHint: Send a question, report a problem, or share feedback from this device.

tracks.foundationSubtitle: Start here with the sound and writing system for {{language}}.
tracks.thematicSubtitle: Core everyday lessons for greetings, food, places, plans, and daily situations.
tracks.intermediateSubtitle: Topic-driven units for opinions, culture, health, work, and everyday confidence.
tracks.professionalSubtitle: Practical language for work, services, housing, safety, and formal situations.
tracks.grammarSubtitle: Pattern clusters that help you connect ideas with more control.

status.preparingNextStep: Tutor is preparing your next step...

speechErrors.permissionBlocked: Microphone or speech recognition permission is blocked. Open Settings, allow the mic for this app, then try again.
speechErrors.noSpeech: No speech was heard. Tap the mic and speak after the listening indicator.

speechErrors.network: Network error during speech recognition. Check your connection and try again.
speechErrors.captureFailed: Could not capture speech. Please try again.

classLesson.nativeGlossToggleHint: Read {{native}} aloud after each {{target}} line. Click any line individually to hear it regardless.

exampleCue.dialogue: Example conversation. Listen to Person A and Person B.

preview.title: Lesson overview
preview.goal: Preview the lesson and set a learning goal.
preview.task: Tell the tutor what you want to understand first.

learn.title: Guided explanation
learn.goal: Study the selected lesson item with the tutor.
learn.task: Ask for a simple explanation or example.

practice.title: Active practice
practice.goal: Use the target language in a short answer.
practice.task: Write or say one original answer using the lesson material.

review.title: Check understanding
review.goal: Review mistakes and summarize what you learned.
review.task: Summarize one thing you learned and one thing that is still unclear.

classLesson.wrapUpBody: Review saved items, use them in conversation, or write them from memory while the lesson is still fresh.

context.title: Lessons shaped around you
context.lockedSubtitle: Pro and Ultra can save approved words, phrases, and situations from real life so future practice feels more relevant. Free and Plus can keep using regular practice.
context.upgradeBody: Upgrade when you want lessons, review prompts, and roleplays to adapt to the everyday language you approve.
context.subtitle: Listen during an intentional session, review the useful items, and save only what you approve.
context.transcriptPlaceholder: Captured transcript or notes appear here.
context.privacyNote: Raw audio is not stored. The transcript is used only for analysis before you approve saving.
context.analyzeHint: Analyze a session to see suggested topics, words, and phrases.
context.practiceNextEmpty: Save personalization items to unlock roleplays, review drills, and class prompts.

instructions.addToBegin: Add a word or sentence to begin.
instructions.trace: Trace over the guide, then clear and write from memory.
instructions.listen: Listen first, then write what you hear.
instructions.meaning: Use the meaning to recall and write the target text.
instructions.stroke: Follow the guide, then practice in the writing area.
instructions.review: Compare your writing with the answer and mark what was strong.

status.emptyNotebook: Add a word or open Class to fill your notebook.

strokeGuide.emptyMemory: Write it again without the guide.
strokeGuide.hangul: {{index}}. {{char}}: top to bottom, left to right, balanced block.
strokeGuide.cjk: {{index}}. {{char}}: horizontal before vertical, top before bottom.
strokeGuide.default: {{index}}. {{char}}: copy the shape, then write from memory.

writing.title: Writing practice
writing.subtitle: Trace, copy, listen, recall by meaning, and keep a handwriting notebook.
writing.empty: No items in this source yet.
writing.recallFallback: Recall the target text from your notebook.
writing.savedReason: Saved from writing practice for another pass.
writing.selfTestReason: Saved from writing practice for a quick self-test.

learningHub.savedEmptyBody: Save useful words from class, flashcards, writing, or conversation to build your own study shelf.

learningHub.bookmarkFailed: Could not bookmark this item right now.
learningHub.recentWordsEmpty: New words from class and conversation will gather here.

learningHub.whyWeakArea: You are seeing this because this area still needs reinforcement.

learningHub.miniSpeakingEmpty: Corrections and saved phrases will become quick speaking drills here.

learningHub.roleplaysEmpty: Saved roleplays will appear here when you want to reuse them.

learningHub.offlinePackInUse: Showing your recent pack while the connection is weak.
learningHub.quickQuizNoAnswer: Recall the meaning, then grade yourself honestly.
learningHub.studyHistoryEmpty: Your study days will gather here as you practice.
learningHub.savedBankEmptyBody: Items you save for this purpose will gather here.
learningHub.recentMistakesBody: These are recent missed items worth retrying while the correction is still fresh.
learningHub.recentMistakesEmptyBody: Missed quiz items will appear here so you can retry them quickly.
learningHub.firstThreeDayReviewBody: Return once to what you saw yesterday so the first items start to stick.
learningHub.firstThreeDaySpeakBody: Use a short speaking turn so the language leaves the page early.
learningHub.firstThreeDayLearnBody: Begin with one small guided lesson so the pair has a clear starting point.
learningHub.analyticsSubtitle: A quick read on what to do next, what needs review, and how your week is moving.
learningHub.nextActionSignalBody: This is chosen from your latest class activity, review queue, and current language-pair setup.
learningHub.reviewClearDetail: Nothing is due right now. Build the queue with one class or saved phrase.

learningHub.speakingTurnsEmpty: Try one short conversation when you are ready.
learningHub.primaryActionLivesAbove: Use the main button above when you are ready to start.

learningHub.recentWordsEmptyAction: Saved words and useful phrases will collect here after class or conversation practice.
learningHub.milestonesEmptyAction: Your first completed lesson, saved phrase, or certificate will appear here.
